text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hey, stop that at once! Why do you keep staring
at me?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I see the problem! Yer not smilin' enough, Air
Groove!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, smile! Ain't there a Japanese sayin' about
fortune coming to the laughin' mates?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: That's not quite correct. Try again.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sure thing! Fortune comes to the dancin' plates!
